BodyName: Committee on Governmental Operations, State & Federal Legislation

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the New York city charter, in relation to combining the archival review board and the archives, reference and research advisory board into a library and archival review advisory board, and to repeal section 3009 of such charter in relation thereto
Items.MatterName: Combining the archival review board and the archives, reference and research advisory board into a library and archival review advisory board, and to repeal section 3009 of such charter in relation thereto.

Items.Title: A Local Law to amend the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to establishing a commission to review the salaries of elected officials in New York City and make recommendations regarding those salaries
Items.MatterName: Establishing a commission to review the salaries of elected officials in New York City and make recommendations regarding those salaries.
